project.title: Lactobacillus surface layer glycosylation
project.projectDescription: the project aims to provide a glycomic and glycoproteomic approach to reveal S-layer glycosylation on lactobacillus kefiri aggregating and non-aggregating strains
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: surface layer proteins were extracted using chaotropic agent 5M NaCl. After dialysis, proteins were purified using SDS-PAGE and WGA Lectin affinity
project.dataProcessingProtocol: Data was obtained using QExactive and analysis was performed using maxquant

references.referenceLine: Malamud M, Cavallero G, Casabuono AC, Lepenies B, Serradell MLA, Couto AS. Immunostimulation by Lactobacillus kefiri S-layer proteins with distinct glycosylation patterns requires different lectin partners. J Biol Chem. 2020
